title: Hello Cheyenne
writer: Harry Sinclair Drago, Fred Myton, Dudley Early
actors: Tom Mix, Tony the Horse, Caryl Lincoln
plot: Rival telephone crews are in a race to be the first to connect telephone service between Rawlings and Cheynne, Wyoming. Lineman Tom Remington's girlfriend is the daughter of one crew foreman, who wants to win the race in order to ...
